msgs.text:
Turn 37 вҖ” grade-two KoszulвҖ“Witt ghosts reduce to the already-cleared first layer I used only the three files attached to this message. The standing question remains the over-G isomorphism problem for the one-relator quotients О“S,О“H defined from F=PвӢҠG, with P the free G-operator pro-2 group on x0,x1, and with relators rS,rH as in the problem statement.

The new result is:

TheВ normalizedВ coefficientВ grade-twoВ layerВ m2/m3 givesВ noВ newВ obstruction.This is a structural reduction, not a one-tail computation.Recall the local coefficient setup from Turn 36. On the dangerous Ef-piece,

R:=EfОӣвүғZ2 [[t]],t=sвҲ’1,m=(2,t).

Turn 36 showed that the raw row(s2+1,sвҲ’1)=(2+2t+t2,t)is exactly Nielsen-equivalent over R to the normalized row (2,t).

Indeed, the elementary shearN=(10вҲ’(s+1)1)satisfies(s2+1,sвҲ’1)N=(2,t),so the apparent grade-two term 2t+t2 is a coordinate artifact, not an invariant obstruction source.

Now writegrm

RвүғF2 [Оұ,ОІ],Оұ=in(2),ОІ=in(t).In these coordinates the normalized row is the regular Koszul row (Оұ,ОІ).

Turn 35 already cleared the whole first coefficient layerm/m2=(2,t)/(4,2t,t2):the t-direction was contractible, and the first 2-direction had no surviving secondary obstruction in any root degree. More precisely, for every dвүҘ4,BdвҶ Hd(2),whereHd(2):=Ld[2]/imОёd0.The base block d=4,вҖҰ,8 was handled directly, and dвүҘ9 followed from the same coefficient-safe root induction as the residual Cd=Ld argument.The point of Turn 37 is that the grade-two coefficient layer is not a new object after this normalization. It is the Koszul square of the first layer.Let V=вҹЁОұ,ОІвҹ©. A coefficient-grade-one correction with coefficient О»вҲҲV and primitive Magnus root WвҲҲLd has the Witt/Bockstein beginningKО»,W2=1+ОұО»W+О»2W[2]+вӢҜ.

Thus the two basic grade-one coefficient ghosts are О»=Оұ:(lowerВ ghost,squareВ ghost)=(Оұ2W,Оұ2W[2]),and О»=ОІ:(lowerВ ghost,squareВ ghost)=(ОұОІW,ОІ2W[2]).This is exactly the normalized grade-two version of Turn 36вҖҷs warning: 2t and t2 must be treated together as the ghost of a t-correction, not as unrelated cases.Now examine the Koszul relation. The lower ghost map in coefficient grade two has the form

VвҠ—(LdвҠ•Ld)вҹ¶S2 VвҠ—Ld,(О»u,Ојv)вҹјОұО»u+ОІОјv.

Its only structural kernel is the Koszul syzygy (ОІW,ОұW),because ОұОІW+ОІОұW=0 in characteristic 2.

The square shadow of this syzygy is(ОІW)[2]+(ОұW)[2]=ОІ2W[2]+Оұ2W[2].

So, in the grade-two secondary quotient, the pure t2 -square ghost is identified with the pure 4-square ghost:ОІ2W[2]вүЎОұ2W[2].That is the key collapse.Consequently, the grade-two secondary obstruction quotient is notОұ2Hd(2)вҠ•ОұОІHd(2)вҠ•ОІ2Hd(2).

The mixed ОұОІ-part is a lower Koszul ghost, and the ОІ2 -part is identified with the Оұ2 -part by the Koszul syzygy. Therefore the only remaining grade-two secondary quotient is a single copy of the already-cleared first 2-Bockstein quotient:Qd,grade2вү…Оұ2Hd(2).

But Turn 35 provedBdвҶ Hd(2)(dвүҘ4).Multiplying those first-layer Bockstein witnesses by the coefficient Оұ gives the grade-two Оұ2 -witnesses. HenceОұ2BdвҶ Оұ2Hd(2).Thus every possible grade-two secondary coefficient defect is killed.

So the whole coefficient layerm2/m3=вҹЁ4,2t,t2вҹ©is harmless after the Turn 36 normalization. The pure 4-piece is the first 2-Bockstein mechanism multiplied by Оұ; the mixed 2t-piece is a Koszul lower ghost; and the pure t2 -square piece is Koszul-equivalent to the pure 4-piece.This is the grade-two analogue of the earlier residual lesson: do not test a fixed coordinate tail. The correct object is the full lower-plus-high torsor modulo the Koszul syzygies. The apparent three separate grade-two cases 4,2t,t2 collapse to one already-cleared first-layer quotient.This still does not finish the original over-G isomorphism proof. The compactness framework still requires nonemptiness of all coefficient-and-degree finite solution sets, and earlier turns correctly isolated finite coefficient nonemptiness as the remaining global proof obligation.But the coefficient induction is now visibly structural. The first layer m/m2 is clear; the second layer m2/m3 reduces to the first by the normalized KoszulвҖ“Witt mechanism; and the next task is no longer to compute 4,2t,t2 tails, but to prove the same KoszulвҖ“Frobenius peeling for all mr/mr+1.

ESTABLISHED: After the exact row normalization (s2+1,sвҲ’1)вҲј(2,t), the coefficient grade-two layer m2/m3 has no new obstruction. The Koszul syzygy (ОІW,ОұW) identifies the t2 -square ghost with the 4-square ghost, the mixed 2t-piece is a lower Koszul ghost, and the remaining pure 4-piece is killed by the already-proved first A2 surjectivity BdвҶ Hd(2).

GAP: The full finite coefficient nonemptiness lemma over every Artinian quotient of RвүғZ2 [[t]] is still not proved. Layers mr/mr+1 for rвүҘ3 remain to be organized uniformly.

NEXT: Prove the general normalized KoszulвҖ“Frobenius induction: for grmR=F2 [Оұ,ОІ], show that every coefficient-grade r square ghost is either a Koszul lower ghost or reduces, by repeated Koszul syzygies, to an iterated Оұ-Bockstein class already killed by the first-layer maps BdвҶ Hd(2). If this induction closes, the coefficient nonemptiness lemma follows and the compactness argument yields О“Sвү…GО“H.[TURN37-GRADE2-KOSZUL-WITT-CLEARED]
